  "concepts": [
    {"id": "c_ai_readiness", "name": "government AI readiness", "aliases": ["AI readiness", "AI preparedness"], "description": "A government's capacity to harness and govern AI, as mapped and scored by the Index.", "grounding_span": "we assess the AI readiness of 195 governments", "location": "overview paragraphs"},
    {"id": "c_harness_public_benefit", "name": "harnessing AI to benefit the public", "aliases": ["core question"], "description": "The Index's refined core question framing readiness as capacity to use AI for public benefit.", "grounding_span": "capacity to harness AI to benefit the public", "location": "header"},
    {"id": "c_gov_roles", "name": "government as buyer, enabler and regulator", "aliases": ["broader role of government"], "description": "Governments influence AI not only by using it but as buyer, enabler and regulator.", "grounding_span": "its broader role as buyer, enabler, and regulator", "location": "overview paragraphs"},
    {"id": "c_ai_value_chains", "name": "AI value chains", "aliases": [], "description": "Expanding chains of value across the AI ecosystem contributing to a complex environment.", "grounding_span": "expanding AI value chains", "location": "overview paragraphs"},
    {"id": "c_ai_sovereignty", "name": "AI sovereignty", "aliases": ["national AI sovereignty", "regional AI sovereignty"], "description": "National and regional efforts to define and secure autonomy across the AI stack.", "grounding_span": "national and regional AI sovereignty", "location": "key takeaways 3"},
    {"id": "c_tech_sovereignty", "name": "technological sovereignty", "aliases": [], "description": "Sovereignty over the technology stack invoked across EU policy communications.", "grounding_span": "‘technological sovereignty’", "location": "key takeaways 3"},
    {"id": "c_cross_border", "name": "cross-border collaboration on AI", "aliases": ["international collaboration"], "description": "Collaboration across borders on AI governance, R&D and norms.", "grounding_span": "the importance of cross-border collaboration on AI", "location": "key takeaways 4"},
    {"id": "c_gpt", "name": "general-purpose technology", "aliases": ["GPT"], "description": "AI characterised as a general-purpose technology capable of reshaping societies and economies.", "grounding_span": "As a general-purpose technology", "location": "key takeaways 3"},
    {"id": "c_sovereign_ai_stack", "name": "sovereign AI stack", "aliases": [], "description": "A domestically controlled AI hardware/software stack, e.g. China's chip and manufacturing ecosystem.", "grounding_span": "China is systematically building a sovereign AI stack", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "c_full_stack_ai", "name": "full-stack AI ecosystem", "aliases": ["full-stack AI collaboration"], "description": "An end-to-end AI ecosystem spanning the technology stack, e.g. Saudi Arabia's HUMAIN.", "grounding_span": "full-stack AI collaboration", "location": "key takeaways 6"},
    {"id": "c_ai_sandboxes", "name": "AI sandboxes", "aliases": ["innovative policy instruments"], "description": "Regulatory sandboxes and other instruments used to develop governance approaches.", "grounding_span": "the role of AI sandboxes and other innovative policy instruments", "location": "key takeaways 2"},
    {"id": "c_national_ai_ecosystem", "name": "national AI innovation ecosystems", "aliases": ["national AI ecosystems"], "description": "Domestic ecosystems governments seek to drive and catalyse.", "grounding_span": "their national AI innovation ecosystems", "location": "key takeaways 2"},
    {"id": "c_dpi", "name": "Digital Public Infrastructure", "aliases": ["DPI"], "description": "A global approach to public digital infrastructure that India built leadership on.", "grounding_span": "a global approach to ‘Digital Public Infrastructure’", "location": "key takeaways 3"},
    {"id": "c_multipolar_landscape", "name": "multipolar AI landscape", "aliases": ["bipolar AI landscape"], "description": "Global AI leadership increasingly concentrated between the US and China.", "grounding_span": "The global AI leadership picture is increasingly bipolar", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "c_ai_governance", "name": "AI governance", "aliases": [], "description": "National, regional and global approaches to governing AI.", "grounding_span": "international collaborations on AI governance", "location": "key takeaways 3"},
    {"id": "c_ai_strategies", "name": "AI strategies", "aliases": ["AI strategies and policies"], "description": "National strategies and policies increasingly put into action.", "grounding_span": "the development and implementation of AI strategies", "location": "key takeaways 2"},
    {"id": "c_ai_funding", "name": "dedicated AI funding", "aliases": ["AI investment"], "description": "Dedicated long-term AI funding, identified as a persistent gap in many settings.", "grounding_span": "dedicated AI funding remains a gap", "location": "key takeaways 2"},
    {"id": "c_ai_infra_investment", "name": "AI infrastructure investment", "aliases": ["digital, data, and AI infrastructure investments"], "description": "Investments in digital, data and AI infrastructure to strengthen domestic AI direction.", "grounding_span": "significant digital, data, and AI infrastructure investments", "location": "key takeaways 6"},
    {"id": "c_compute_infrastructure", "name": "compute infrastructure", "aliases": [], "description": "Compute capacity underpinning the US position in the rankings.", "grounding_span": "research institutions, and compute infrastructure", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "c_private_sector_ecosystem", "name": "private sector ecosystem", "aliases": [], "description": "The private-sector AI ecosystem that buoys national readiness.", "grounding_span": "its private sector ecosystem", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "c_ai_talent", "name": "AI talent attraction", "aliases": ["AI and tech talent"], "description": "Attracting AI and tech talent as part of long-term national toolkits, e.g. China's K Visa.", "grounding_span": "to attract AI and tech talent", "location": "key takeaways 6"},
    {"id": "c_public_service_ai", "name": "implementing AI in public services", "aliases": ["AI in public services"], "description": "Prior focus of the Index: implementing AI within public services.", "grounding_span": "implementing AI in public services", "location": "overview paragraphs"},
    {"id": "c_dim_policy_capacity", "name": "Policy Capacity", "aliases": [], "description": "Index dimension covering policy vision and commitment.", "grounding_span": "Policy CapacityAI InfrastructureGovernancePublic Sector AdoptionDevelopment & DiffusionResilience", "location": "scores chart"},
    {"id": "c_dim_ai_infrastructure", "name": "AI Infrastructure", "aliases": [], "description": "Index dimension covering compute, technical infrastructure and data.", "grounding_span": "Policy CapacityAI InfrastructureGovernancePublic Sector AdoptionDevelopment & DiffusionResilience", "location": "scores chart"},
    {"id": "c_dim_governance", "name": "Governance", "aliases": [], "description": "Index dimension covering governance principles and regulatory compliance.", "grounding_span": "Policy CapacityAI InfrastructureGovernancePublic Sector AdoptionDevelopment & DiffusionResilience", "location": "scores chart"},
    {"id": "c_dim_public_sector_adoption", "name": "Public Sector Adoption", "aliases": [], "description": "Index dimension covering government digital policy and e-government delivery.", "grounding_span": "Policy CapacityAI InfrastructureGovernancePublic Sector AdoptionDevelopment & DiffusionResilience", "location": "scores chart"},
    {"id": "c_dim_development_diffusion", "name": "Development & Diffusion", "aliases": [], "description": "Index dimension covering human capital, AI sector maturity and technology diffusion.", "grounding_span": "Policy CapacityAI InfrastructureGovernancePublic Sector AdoptionDevelopment & DiffusionResilience", "location": "scores chart"},

    {"id": "cl_us_top", "claim_text": "the US retains the top position in our rankings", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "the US retains the top position in our rankings", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "cl_us_score", "claim_text": "North America (led by the US) records a total score of 81.51 and ranks 1st", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Total | 81.51", "location": "pillar score table"},
    {"id": "cl_china_understates", "claim_text": "China's position in the Index likely understates its true capabilities", "claim_type": "speculative", "grounding_span": "China’s position in the Index likely understates its true capabilities", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "cl_china_research", "claim_text": "China's AI research output in 2024 matched the combined publications of the US, UK and EU, with 156 institutions each producing over 50 AI papers", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "China’s AI research output in 2024 matched the combined publications of the US, UK and EU, with 156 institutions each producing over 50 AI papers", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "cl_deepseek_qwen", "claim_text": "Models like DeepSeek and Alibaba's Qwen have demonstrated performance rivalling Western counterparts at a fraction of the development cost", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Models like DeepSeek and Alibaba’s Qwen have demonstrated performance rivalling Western counterparts at a fraction of the development cost", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "cl_china_investment", "claim_text": "China's sovereign AI stack is backed by over US$140 billion in state investment through the National Integrated Circuit Industry Investment Fund", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "backed by over US$140 billion in state investment through the National Integrated Circuit Industry Investment Fund", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "cl_sic_wafer", "claim_text": "China controls 50% of global silicon carbide wafer production and dominates rare earth processing", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "including 50% of global silicon carbide wafer production and dominance in rare earth processing", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "cl_gap_narrower", "claim_text": "The gap between the US and China is almost certainly narrower than the rankings suggest", "claim_type": "speculative", "grounding_span": "The gap between the US and China is almost certainly narrower than the rankings suggest", "location": "key takeaways 1"},
    {"id": "cl_china_rank8", "claim_text": "China is ranked 8th, up from 23rd in 2024", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "China (ranked 8th, up from 23rd in 2024)", "location": "key takeaways 3"},
    {"id": "cl_195", "claim_text": "The Index assesses the AI readiness of 195 governments", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "we assess the AI readiness of 195 governments", "location": "overview paragraphs"},
    {"id": "cl_phil_seven", "claim_text": "The Philippines rose seven places in this year's Index", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "the Philippines, rising seven places in this year’s Index", "location": "key takeaways 4"},
    {"id": "cl_funding_gap", "claim_text": "The existence and extent of dedicated AI funding remains a gap in many settings", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "the existence and extent – of dedicated AI funding remains a gap in many settings", "location": "key takeaways 2"}
